title: coelogyne rotundilabia
intro: Coelogyne rotundilabia, also known as the rounded-lipped coelogyne, is an orchid species native to India and Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique rounded labellum and fragrant white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Coelogyne rotundilabia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
